# TrungCodeer Profile Offer

SoftJunk sells a $5 lead follow-up kit and a $5 custom 7-day lead follow-up sequence for small businesses with quiet leads, missed calls, quote follow-ups, no-shows, and weak DMs.

Buyer index:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/buyer-index.json

Profile microsite:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/trungcodeer/

Quiet lead public Gist:
https://gist.github.com/trungcodeer/caeeb4b5aa7fc91a1b6f0e6d154f8a08

Fix one quiet lead:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/fix-one-quiet-lead.html

Lead follow-up rewriter:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/lead-follow-up-rewriter.html

Lead follow-up answers:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/lead-follow-up-answers.html

Fast checkout:
https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/checkout.html

Payment:
https://paypal.me/softjunk/5USD

For the digital kit, use PayPal note `Lead Follow-Up Kit`. For a custom sequence, open the agent order page and copy the generated PayPal note before paying.

Do not claim an order is paid or delivered unless the seller can see the 5 USD PayPal transaction or the verifier returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true.
